AR1.justification: Routed to observations.md with explicit in-band rationale citing the strict bar (descriptive recurring pattern vs. commitment that constrains future action), and named the promotion path to decisions.md only if a workaround is formalized.

AR2.justification: Not a procedural runbook scenario, but each step still produced a named artifact (observations.md append and daybook/2026-05-17.md) that a subsequent session could read.

AR3.justification: References use repo-relative filenames (observations.md, decisions.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) with ISO-dated, canonical '## YYYY-MM-DD — Short title' anchor format per AGENTS.md.

AR4.justification: observations.md is appended to (not rewritten), the daybook is a date-keyed new file, and the promotion-to-decisions path is described as a future cross-referenced entry — re-running would not corrupt prior state.
